name: Nova Visual
description: Modern, editorial wedding photography and cinematic drone coverage. We blend cutting-edge technology with artistic vision to create a visual experience that is bold, sleek, and unforgettable.

includes: Highlight reel of drone footage (2 min)
Highlight reel of drone footage (3 min)
Licensed drone operator for aerial coverage

videography_addon.note: Video is core to our offering. All packages include drone footage. Half-day and full-day include a cinematic highlight film. Full cinematic wedding film and same-day edit available as upgrades.

album_and_print_addons.note: Full-day package includes 40-page premium lay-flat album and 24x36 canvas. We use archival-quality materials exclusively.

deposit_and_cancellation.retainer_note: Non-refundable retainer secures your date and production crew.

sweeteners: Free drone add-on for half-day bookings in November-March
Complimentary canvas print upgrade for early bookings (6+ months out)
Exclusive behind-the-scenes mini film for full-day clients
Priority editing with 2-week turnaround for premium package

personality.notes: Positions as a premium, tech-forward brand. Rarely discounts but will add high-value extras for ideal clients. FAA-licensed drone pilot. Strong portfolio of venue aerials. Attracts couples who want a cinematic, modern look.
